description_long: This object is a classic hot dog featuring a plump, reddish-brown sausage nestled inside a soft, rounded bun. The top of the hot dog is generously covered with a green relish, speckled with small red and green bits, suggesting the presence of chopped pickles and peppers. The sausage itself is slightly glossy and displays several dark grill marks along its length, adding a sense of authenticity and cooked flavor. The bun appears smooth and slightly shiny, with a uniform brown color and a gentle curve that cradles the sausage. No packaging is visible, and the hot dog is presented as if ready to eat. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of street food found in urban parks or at food stands.
description: A plump sausage with visible grill marks sits in a soft bun, topped with chunky green relish. The hot dog looks fresh and ready to eat, with no packaging present.
description_view_0: The hot dog is viewed from the end, showing the rounded tip of the sausage and a thick layer of green relish on top.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the sausage, the bun, and prominent grill marks, with relish spread across the top.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors view 0, highlighting the rounded sausage tip and relish coverage.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, but with the bun and sausage more visible and the grill marks less pronounced.
